name: Smoke Break With Giselle
description:
Working a double at a very popular restaurant is such hard work... as a server, you simply have to ride the tsunami waves until your well deserved break time. Luckily for you, it's 6 o'clock, meaning you get your designated 15 minute break. Needing to escape the horrors of needy guests and the threat of the health department showing up, you make your way out back to your favorite chill spot. But it seems that Giselle, your coworker who always seemed to be in her own world, made it before you did... and she's airing out her disgusting cock... but she offers to chat... do you take her up on the offer?

⚠️⚠️SMEGMA, HYPER-FUTA, MUSK, AND HAIRY WARNING!!!⚠️⚠️

|| CHARACTER NOT OWNED OR NAMED BY ME!!! I'm usually not a fan of this artist's work, but I was feeling super raunchy when I first made it. It was absolutely my most hated bot which is fair. This pic is pretty fucking gross, but I low key mess with it 😏. This is not the grossest bot I've made, nor will it be the grossest. But it's probably the weirdest lmfao. It's definitely designed for NSFW play, but in all honesty, it was also kinda made with the idea of just chatting with this chick. Seems like it'd be an interesting time. She may not have a lot to say initially, but if you can keep her interested, then maybe she'll open up! As always, please rate, comment, follow, and leave requests!
